steps.t: Trumpeters can be found on the Pelennor Fields, after the battle. Mithrandir has asked you to find trumpeters throughout the Pelennor Fields that migh…
Mithrandir asked you to travel to the western gate of Osgiliath after you gathered four trumpeters.
Nethadan is at the western entrance to Osgiliath. You gathered a number of trumpeters to travel with Aragorn's army and announce the coming of King El…
Bandron is at the western entrance to Osgiliath. You gathered a number of trumpeters to travel with Aragorn's army and announce the coming of King Ele…
Aragorn's army is passing through Osgiliath, and Mithrandir intended to meet you at the eastern gate of the city.
Mithrandir is astride Shadowfax at the east gate of Osgiliath.
